result.reason: Settings fail to save/load in Russian locale because numeric parsing (int.TryParse, Convert.ToDouble) uses the current culture instead of InvariantCulture, causing failures when Russian locale formats numbers differently.
result.approach: Add CultureInfo.InvariantCulture to all int.TryParse and numeric conversion calls in XmlExtensions.GetAttributeAsInt() and related deserializer methods to prevent locale-sensitive parsing failures.

attempts.raw_output:
Based on the analysis, this is a classic culture-sensitive parsing issue. The "Settings in Russian translation not saved" is most likely caused by culture-aware number parsing failing when the UI locale is Russian (which uses comma as decimal separator).
